description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named build that runs on push to the master branch and on workflow dispatch. The workflow consists of two jobs: get_supported_boards and build. The get_supported_boards job checks out the repository, runs a script to get supported boards, and uploads the result as an artifact. The build job depends on get_supported_boards, checks out the repository, downloads the supported boards artifact, installs the GitHub CLI, checks the supported boards file, and then reads the supported boards and triggers a build for each board using a template workflow.
